creator: jbe@magnetkern.de
text:
Of course, fixing this bug (without providing an option to revert back to the old behavior on demand, e.g. through sysctl) will break certain functionality.

But not fixing this bug is a security issue (e.g. chmod will not take immediate effect, such that when group memberships are changed, people may access files that they were never supposed to read). For a detailed discussion see the provided links above.
